payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new because it is the latest active memory for Sam from Goldman. mem_old was excluded because it is explicitly superseded, and superseded memories are filtered so outdated facts are not presented as current.
payload.decision: Recall selected mem_new as the current memory for Sam at Goldman because mem_old is marked superseded and therefore filtered from current results.

entity_resolution.reason: The query refers to an existing entity, Sam, in the Goldman context; no new entity creation is needed.

memory_cards.statement: Sam is associated with Goldman according to mem_new, which is the active memory.
mem_old was filtered because it is superseded by a newer memory and should not be returned as current.

details: Resolved the query to Sam in the Goldman context.
Identified mem_new as the active memory record.
Applied recall policy to exclude superseded memories from current results.

repair_options: Inspect the superseded_by link between mem_old and mem_new.
Verify mem_new is marked active/current and mem_old is marked superseded.
If historical recall is desired, enable inclusion of superseded memories in debug or timeline views.
